<!-- Use a Conventional Commit title: <type>[optional scope][!]: <description>. -->
<!-- Replace every instructional comment below with concrete, reviewable content. -->

## Outcome
<!-- State the observable actor or system outcome. -->

## Change class and lifecycle
<!-- Name the change class and its proportional lifecycle/profile. -->

## Governing scope
<!-- Name governing specifications, affected claims, authority, and non-goals. -->

## Design and changes
<!-- Explain the bounded design and the smallest realization made. -->

## Evidence
<!-- Retain positive, negative, regression, and relevant integration observations. -->

### Baseline / falsifier
<!-- Record the initial deficit and the cheapest observation that could refute the change. -->

### Verification
<!-- List exact commands, inputs, expected observations, and results. -->

## Risks, assumptions, and exclusions
<!-- State known risks, assumptions, exclusions, and any contradictory evidence. -->

## Recovery, maintenance, and reopen triggers
<!-- Describe rollback/recovery, continuing ownership, and observations that reopen work. -->

## Review plan and dispositions
<!-- Name required reviewers and dispose each material concern with evidence. -->
